LanguageData.Shell_120mmMortar_HE.label: 120mm mortar shell (HE)
LanguageData.Shell_120mmMortar_HE.description: Low-velocity shell designed to be fired from a mortar.

LanguageData.Shell_120mmMortar_EMP.description: Low-velocity shell designed to be fired from a mortar.
LanguageData.Shell_120mmMortar_Firefoam.label: 120mm mortar shell (Foam)
LanguageData.Shell_120mmMortar_Firefoam.description: Low-velocity shell designed to be fired from a mortar.
LanguageData.Shell_120mmMortar_Smoke.label: 120mm mortar shell (Smoke)
LanguageData.Shell_120mmMortar_Smoke.description: Low-velocity shell designed to be fired from a mortar.
